eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lyon; Mineral; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; Carson City; Elko; Douglas; Churchill, NV; at 11:24 AM on AUG 5, 2019 Effective until 12:24 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
